title: Colored Digit Domain Generalization

target.name: label
target.description: Noisy binary digit class for held-out colored handwritten digit images.

feature_descriptions.image_path: Member path inside data/images.zip. If the archive is extracted at the task root, this is also the image path on disk.
feature_descriptions.label: Training label; omitted from test rows.

domain_background: Train on labeled source domains and predict binary labels for a held-out domain under a visual distribution shift.
allowed_external_resources: Use public machine-learning and package documentation. Do not use hidden reference files.
